response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with modern languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java) but lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust, which are core requirements for this role. Their geospatial experience is limited to an open-source GIS platform, and their recent work at Stripe/Shopify doesn't align closely with routing tiling or navigation systems. However, their problem-solving approach, polyglot expertise, and willingness to learn could make them a viable candidate if they can demonstrate quick adaptation to C++ and geospatial data pipelines.
strengths: Strong distributed systems and low-latency application experience (Dunnhumby, RIDE Capital)
Extensive full-stack development across multiple languages and domains
Proven track record of building scalable systems and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust, the primary languages for this role
Limited exposure to geospatial data processing or navigation systems beyond a hobbyist GIS platform
Recent work has been in web/mobile domains rather than routing tiling or data pipelines
